title.en: Biographies of Han Xin (King of Han) and Lu Wan
title.raw: 《韓信盧綰列傳》Biographies of Han Xin (King of Han) and Lu Wan

sentences.zh: 韓王信者，故韓襄王孽孫也，長八尺五寸。

translations.literal: Han King Xin was a descendant through a concubine's line of the former King Xiang of Han, and was eight chi five cun tall.
translations.idiomatic: Han Xin, the King of Han, was a descendant of the former King Xiang of Han through a concubine's line. He stood eight feet five inches tall.

sentences.zh: 及項梁之立楚後懷王也，燕、齊、趙、魏皆已前王，唯韓無有後，故立韓諸公子橫陽君成為韓王，欲以撫定韓故地。

translations.literal: When Xiang Liang established the later King Huai of Chu, Yan, Qi, Zhao, and Wei had all already restored their former kings; only Han had no heir, so they established the Lord of Hengyang, Cheng, one of the princes of Han, as King of Han, wishing to pacify and settle the former territory of Han.
translations.idiomatic: When Xiang Liang installed the later King Huai of Chu, the states of Yan, Qi, Zhao, and Wei had all already restored their former royal lines. Only Han had no surviving heir, so they established Cheng, the Lord of Hengyang and a prince of the Han royal house, as King of Han, intending to pacify and settle the former Han territories.

sentences.zh: 項梁敗死定陶，成奔懷王。

translations.literal: Xiang Liang was defeated and died at Dingtao; Cheng fled to King Huai.
translations.idiomatic: When Xiang Liang was defeated and killed at Dingtao, Cheng fled to King Huai.

sentences.zh: 沛公引兵擊陽城，使張良以韓司徒降下韓故地，得信，以為韓將，將其兵從沛公入武關。

translations.literal: The Lord of Pei led troops to attack Yangcheng, sent Zhang Liang as the Han Minister of Education to receive the surrender of Han's former territory, obtained Xin, made him a Han general, and had him lead troops following the Lord of Pei through Wu Pass.
translations.idiomatic: The Lord of Pei led his forces to attack Yangcheng and dispatched Zhang Liang, serving as the Minister of Education of Han, to secure the surrender of the former Han territories. There he obtained Han Xin's services, appointed him as a general of Han, and had him lead his troops to follow the Lord of Pei through the Wu Pass.

translations.literal: Han Wang Xin, former Han Xiang Wang bastard grandson, long eight chi five cun. Reach Xiang Liang establish Chu after Huai Wang, Yan, Qi, Zhao, Wei all already before wang, only Han no have after, therefore establish Han various gong zi Heng Yang Jun Cheng become Han Wang, desire with pacify settle Han old land. Xiang Liang defeat die Ding Tao, Cheng flee Huai Wang. Pei Gong lead troops strike Yang Cheng, make Zhang Liang with Han si tu descend Han old land, obtain Xin, become Han jiang, lead his troops follow Pei Gong enter Wu Guan.

sentences.zh: 沛公立為漢王，韓信從入漢中，乃說漢王曰：「項王王諸將近地，而王獨遠居此，此左遷也。

translations.literal: When the Lord of Pei was established as King of Han, Han Xin followed into Hanzhong and counseled the King of Han saying: 'The King of Xiang enfeoffed all his generals with nearby territories, yet Your Majesty alone dwells far away here; this is a demotion.'
translations.idiomatic: When the Lord of Pei was established as King of Han, Han Xin followed him into Hanzhong. He counseled the King of Han, saying: 'The King of Xiang has enfeoffed all his other generals with territories close at hand, yet Your Majesty alone has been banished to this remote place. This is a demotion.

sentences.zh: 士卒皆山東人，跂而望歸，及其鋒東鄉，可以爭天下。」

translations.literal: The soldiers are all men from east of the mountains; they stand on tiptoe gazing homeward. If you take advantage of their sharp eagerness and turn east, you can contend for the realm.
translations.idiomatic: Your soldiers are all men from east of the mountains who stand on tiptoe gazing homeward. If you harness their eagerness and march east, you can contend for the empire.'

sentences.zh: 漢王還定三秦，乃許信為韓王，先拜信為韓太尉，將兵略韓地。

translations.literal: When the King of Han returned and pacified the Three Qin, he then promised Xin the title of King of Han, first appointing Xin as Grand Commandant of Han, and had him lead troops to take the Han territory.
translations.idiomatic: When the King of Han returned to conquer the Three Qin kingdoms, he promised to make Han Xin the King of Han. First, he appointed Xin as Grand Commandant of Han and sent him to lead troops to take the Han territories.

translations.literal: Pei Gong establish become Han Wang, Han Xin follow enter Han Zhong, then say Han Wang said: 'Xiang Wang wang various jiang near land, yet wang alone far dwell this, this left move.' Shi zu all Shan Dong person, qi yet hope return, reach its front east xiang, able contend tian xia.' Han Wang return settle three Qin, then allow Xin become Han Wang, first appoint Xin become Han tai wei, lead troops sweep Han land.

sentences.zh: 項籍之封諸王皆就國，韓王成以不從無功，不遣就國，更以為列侯。

translations.literal: When Xiang Ji enfeoffed all the kings and they each went to their kingdoms, King Cheng of Han, because he had not followed and had no merit, was not sent to his kingdom and was instead made a marquis.
translations.idiomatic: When Xiang Ji enfeoffed all the kings and they went to their domains, King Cheng of Han had not accompanied Xiang Ji and had no merit to his name, so he was not allowed to proceed to his domain. Instead, he was demoted to the rank of marquis.

sentences.zh: 及聞漢遣韓信略韓地，乃令故項籍游吳時吳令鄭昌為韓王以距漢。

translations.literal: When he heard that Han had sent Han Xin to take the Han territory, he appointed Zheng Chang, who had been the Magistrate of Wu when Xiang Ji traveled in Wu, as King of Han to resist Han.
translations.idiomatic: When Xiang Ji heard that Han had dispatched Han Xin to take the Han territories, he appointed Zheng Chang, who had served as the Magistrate of Wu when Xiang Ji was traveling in Wu, as King of Han to resist the Han forces.

sentences.zh: 漢二年，韓信略定韓十餘城。

translations.literal: In the second year of Han, Han Xin conquered and pacified more than ten cities of Han.
translations.idiomatic: In the second year of the Han dynasty, Han Xin conquered more than ten cities in the Han territory.

sentences.zh: 漢王至河南，韓信急擊韓王昌陽城。

translations.literal: When the King of Han reached Henan, Han Xin urgently attacked King Chang of Han at Yangcheng.
translations.idiomatic: When the King of Han arrived at Henan, Han Xin launched a swift attack on King Chang of Han at Yangcheng.

sentences.zh: 昌降，漢王乃立韓信為韓王，常將韓兵從。

translations.literal: Chang surrendered, and the King of Han then established Han Xin as King of Han; he constantly led Han troops in service.
translations.idiomatic: Chang surrendered, and the King of Han thereupon established Han Xin as King of Han. Xin regularly led the Han troops in the king's service.

sentences.zh: 三年，漢王出滎陽，韓王信、周苛等守滎陽。

translations.literal: In the third year, the King of Han left Xingyang; Han King Xin, Zhou Ke, and others defended Xingyang.
translations.idiomatic: In the third year, when the King of Han left Xingyang, Han Xin the King of Han, along with Zhou Ke and others, was left to defend Xingyang.

sentences.zh: 及楚敗滎陽，信降楚，已而得亡，復歸漢，漢復立以為韓王，竟從擊破項籍，天下定。

translations.literal: When Chu defeated Xingyang, Xin surrendered to Chu; afterward he managed to escape, returned to Han, and Han again established him as King of Han. He ultimately followed in defeating Xiang Ji, and the realm was settled.
translations.idiomatic: When Chu defeated Xingyang, Xin surrendered to Chu. Later he managed to escape and returned to Han, and the Han court restored him as King of Han. He ultimately joined in the campaign that defeated Xiang Ji, and the realm was settled.

sentences.zh: 五年春，遂與剖符為韓王，王潁川。

translations.literal: In the spring of the fifth year, he was thereupon invested as King of Han with the splitting of the tally, and ruled over Yingchuan.
translations.idiomatic: In the spring of the fifth year, he was formally invested as King of Han with the splitting of the tally, and he ruled over Yingchuan.

translations.literal: Xiang Ji seal various wang all go country, Han Wang Cheng with not follow no merit, not send go country, change become lie hou. Reach hear Han send Han Xin sweep Han land, then make former Xiang Ji you Wu time Wu ling Zheng Chang become Han Wang with resist Han. Han two years, Han Xin sweep settle Han ten remain city. Han Wang reach He Nan, Han Xin urgent strike Han Wang Chang Yang Cheng. Chang descend, Han Wang then establish Han Xin become Han Wang, constant lead Han troops follow. Three years, Han Wang out Xing Yang, Han Wang Xin, Zhou Ke wait guard Xing Yang. Reach Chu defeat Xing Yang, Xin descend Chu, already yet obtain flee, again return Han, Han again establish become Han Wang, finally follow strike break Xiang Ji, tian xia settle. Five years spring, then with carve fu become Han Wang, wang Ying Chuan.

sentences.zh: 明年春，上以韓信材武，所王北近鞏、洛，南迫宛、葉，東有淮陽，皆天下勁兵處，乃詔徙韓王信王太原以北，備御胡，都晉陽。

translations.literal: The next spring, the Emperor, considering that Han Xin was talented and martial, and that his kingdom was close to Gong and Luo in the north, bordered Wan and Ye in the south, and held Huaiyang in the east—all locations of the realm's crack troops—issued a decree to transfer the King of Han to rule north of Taiyuan, to defend against the Hu, with his capital at Jinyang.
translations.idiomatic: The following spring, the Emperor, noting that Han Xin was a man of martial talent and that his kingdom lay close to Gong and Luoyang in the north, bordered Wan and Ye in the south, and included Huaiyang in the east—all strategic positions for the empire's most formidable troops—issued a decree transferring the King of Han to rule north of Taiyuan, charged with defending against the Hu nomads, with his capital at Jinyang.

sentences.zh: 信上書曰：「國被邊，匈奴數入，晉陽去塞遠，請治馬邑。」

translations.literal: Xin submitted a memorial saying: 'The kingdom borders the frontier; the Xiongnu frequently invade; Jinyang is far from the border passes. I request to administer from Mayi.'
translations.idiomatic: Xin submitted a memorial saying: 'My kingdom lies along the frontier, and the Xiongnu invade frequently. Jinyang is too far from the border passes. I request permission to govern from Mayi.'

sentences.zh: 上許之，信乃徙治馬邑。

translations.literal: The Emperor permitted it, and Xin thereupon moved to administer from Mayi.
translations.idiomatic: The Emperor granted his request, and Xin moved his seat of government to Mayi.

sentences.zh: 秋，匈奴冒頓大圍信，信數使使胡求和解。

translations.literal: In autumn, the Xiongnu Chanyu Modu laid a great siege around Xin; Xin repeatedly sent envoys to the Hu to seek a peace settlement.
translations.idiomatic: That autumn, the Xiongnu Chanyu Modu besieged Xin with a massive force. Xin sent envoy after envoy to the Xiongnu to negotiate peace.

sentences.zh: 漢發兵救之，疑信數閒使，有二心，使人責讓信。

translations.literal: Han dispatched troops to rescue him, but suspected Xin of frequently sending secret envoys and harboring divided loyalties, and sent someone to rebuke and reproach Xin.
translations.idiomatic: Han dispatched troops to relieve him, but suspected that Xin's frequent secret embassies meant he harbored divided loyalties, and sent a messenger to rebuke him.

sentences.zh: 信恐誅，因與匈奴約共攻漢，反，以馬邑降胡，擊太原。

translations.literal: Xin, fearing execution, thereupon made a pact with the Xiongnu to jointly attack Han, rebelled, surrendered Mayi to the Hu, and attacked Taiyuan.
translations.idiomatic: Xin, fearing execution, made a pact with the Xiongnu to jointly attack Han. He rebelled, surrendered Mayi to the Xiongnu, and struck at Taiyuan.

translations.literal: Next year spring, shang with Han Xin cai wu, place wang north near Gong, Luo, south press Wan, Ye, east have Huai Yang, all tian xia strong troops place, then zhao move Han Wang Xin wang Tai Yuan with north, prepare yu Hu, capital Jin Yang. Xin shang book said: 'Country border edge, Xiong Nu number enter, Jin Yang go sai far, please govern Ma Yi.' Shang allow it, Xin then move govern Ma Yi. Autumn, Xiong Nu Mao Dun big surround Xin, Xin number make shi Hu seek peace dissolve. Han send troops save it, suspect Xin number space shi, have two heart, make person blame let Xin. Xin fear execute, because with Xiong Nu about together attack Han, rebel, with Ma Yi descend Hu, strike Tai Yuan.

sentences.zh: 七年冬，上自往擊，破信軍銅鞮，斬其將王喜。

translations.literal: In the winter of the seventh year, the Emperor personally went to attack, defeated Xin's army at Tongdi, and beheaded his general Wang Xi.
translations.idiomatic: In the winter of the seventh year, the Emperor personally led a campaign against him, defeating Xin's army at Tongdi and beheading his general Wang Xi.

sentences.zh: 信亡走匈奴。

translations.literal: Xin fled to the Xiongnu.
translations.idiomatic: Xin fled to the Xiongnu.

sentences.zh: （與）其與白土人曼丘臣、王黃等立趙苗裔趙利為王，復收信敗散兵，而與信及冒頓謀攻漢。

translations.literal: He and Manqiu Chen and Wang Huang, men of Baitu, established Zhao Li, a descendant of the Zhao royal line, as king, gathered Xin's defeated and scattered troops, and together with Xin and Modu plotted to attack Han.
translations.idiomatic: Together with Manqiu Chen and Wang Huang, men of Baitu, they set up Zhao Li, a scion of the Zhao royal house, as king. They rallied Xin's defeated and scattered troops and, together with Xin and Modu, plotted to attack Han.

sentences.zh: 匈奴仗左右賢王將萬餘騎與王黃等屯廣武以南，至晉陽，與漢兵戰，漢大破之，追至于離石，復破之。

translations.literal: The Xiongnu deployed the Wise Kings of the Left and Right leading more than ten thousand cavalry with Wang Huang and others to encamp south of Guangwu, reaching Jinyang, where they fought the Han army. Han inflicted a great defeat on them, pursued them to Lishi, and defeated them again.
translations.idiomatic: The Xiongnu deployed their Wise Kings of the Left and Right with more than ten thousand cavalry, who joined Wang Huang's forces and encamped south of Guangwu, advancing as far as Jinyang. They engaged the Han army, but Han won a decisive victory, pursuing them to Lishi and defeating them once more.

sentences.zh: 匈奴復聚兵樓煩西北，漢令車騎擊破匈奴。

translations.literal: The Xiongnu reassembled their troops northwest of Loufan; Han ordered chariots and cavalry to attack and defeat the Xiongnu.
translations.idiomatic: The Xiongnu reassembled their forces to the northwest of Loufan, but Han sent its chariots and cavalry to attack and rout them.

sentences.zh: 匈奴常敗走，漢乘勝追北，聞冒頓居代（上）谷，高皇帝居晉陽，使人視冒頓，還報曰「可擊」。

translations.literal: The Xiongnu were constantly defeated and fled; Han pursued in victory. Hearing that Modu was stationed in the Dai Valley, the High Emperor, staying at Jinyang, sent scouts to observe Modu; they returned and reported: 'He can be attacked.'
translations.idiomatic: The Xiongnu suffered defeat after defeat and retreated. Han pressed its advantage and pursued northward. Hearing that Modu was encamped in the Dai Valley, the High Emperor, based at Jinyang, sent scouts to assess his forces. They returned and reported: 'He can be attacked.'

sentences.zh: 上遂至平城。

translations.literal: The Emperor then advanced to Pingcheng.
translations.idiomatic: The Emperor then advanced to Pingcheng.

sentences.zh: 上出白登，匈奴騎圍上，上乃使人厚遺閼氏。

translations.literal: The Emperor went out to Baideng, and the Xiongnu cavalry surrounded him. The Emperor then sent someone to present lavish gifts to the Chanyu's consort.
translations.idiomatic: The Emperor rode out to Baideng, where the Xiongnu cavalry surrounded him. He then sent an envoy to present lavish gifts to the Chanyu's consort.

sentences.zh: 閼氏乃說冒頓曰：「今得漢地，猶不能居；

translations.literal: The consort then persuaded Modu, saying: 'Even if you take the Han lands, you still could not dwell there;'
translations.idiomatic: The consort persuaded Modu, saying: 'Even if you were to seize the Han lands, you could not hold them.

sentences.zh: 且兩主不相緱」居七日，胡騎稍引去。

translations.literal: Moreover, two rulers should not corner each other.' After seven days, the Hu cavalry gradually withdrew.
translations.idiomatic: Moreover, two rulers should not press each other into a corner.' After seven days, the Xiongnu cavalry gradually withdrew.

sentences.zh: 時天大霧，漢使人往來，胡不覺。

translations.literal: At the time there was a great fog; Han sent people to come and go, and the Hu did not notice.
translations.idiomatic: A thick fog had descended, and the Han envoys were able to pass back and forth without the Xiongnu noticing.

sentences.zh: 護軍中尉陳平言上曰：「胡者全兵，請令彊弩傅兩矢外向，徐行出圍。」

translations.literal: The Commandant of the Guard, Chen Ping, said to the Emperor: 'The Hu keep their troops intact; I request that we order the strong crossbowmen to load two bolts facing outward and slowly march out of the encirclement.'
translations.idiomatic: Chen Ping, the Commandant of the Guard, advised the Emperor: 'The Xiongnu rely on massed cavalry. I suggest we order our strongest crossbowmen to load two bolts apiece, facing outward, and march slowly out of the encirclement.'

sentences.zh: 入平城，漢救兵亦到，胡騎遂解去。

translations.literal: They entered Pingcheng; the Han relief forces also arrived, and the Hu cavalry thereupon dispersed and withdrew.
translations.idiomatic: They reached Pingcheng, where the Han relief forces had also arrived, and the Xiongnu cavalry broke off and withdrew.

sentences.zh: 漢亦罷兵歸。

translations.literal: Han also withdrew its troops and returned.
translations.idiomatic: The Han forces withdrew as well.

sentences.zh: 韓信為匈奴將兵往來擊邊。

translations.literal: Han Xin served as a Xiongnu general, leading troops back and forth to attack the border.
translations.idiomatic: Han Xin now served as a general for the Xiongnu, leading raids back and forth along the border.

translations.literal: Seven years winter, shang self go strike, break Xin army Tong Di, cut his jiang Wang Xi. Xin flee walk Xiong Nu. Its with Bai Tu person Man Qiu Chen, Wang Huang wait establish Zhao Miao yi Zhao Li become wang, again collect Xin defeat scatter troops, yet with Xin and Mao Dun plan attack Han. Xiong Nu depend left right Xian Wang lead ten thousand remain ride with Wang Huang wait garrison Guang Wu with south, reach Jin Yang, with Han troops battle, Han big break it, pursue reach Li Shi, again break it. Xiong Nu again gather troops Lou Fan north west, Han make che ride strike break Xiong Nu. Xiong Nu constant defeat walk, Han ride victory pursue north, hear Mao Dun dwell Dai Gu, Gao Huang Di dwell Jin Yang, make person see Mao Dun, return report said 'able strike'. Shang then reach Ping Cheng. Shang out Bai Deng, Xiong Nu ride surround shang, shang then make person thick yi Yan Zhi. Yan Zhi then say Mao Dun said: 'Now obtain Han land, still not able dwell; And two jun not each gou' dwell seven days, Hu ride gradually lead go. Time heaven big fog, Han make person go come, Hu not aware. Hu jun zhong wei Chen Ping speak shang said: 'Hu wait whole troops, please make strong nu fu two arrow outside toward, slow walk out surround.' Enter Ping Cheng, Han save troops also arrive, Hu ride then dissolve go. Han also stop troops return. Han Xin become Xiong Nu jiang troops go come strike border.

sentences.zh: 漢十年，信令王黃等說誤陳豨。

translations.literal: In the tenth year of Han, Xin had Wang Huang and others persuade and mislead Chen Xi.
translations.idiomatic: In the tenth year of the Han dynasty, Xin had Wang Huang and others persuade and lead Chen Xi astray.

sentences.zh: 十一年春，故韓王信復與胡騎入居參合，距漢。

translations.literal: In the spring of the eleventh year, the former King of Han, Xin, again entered with Hu cavalry and occupied Canhe, resisting Han.
translations.idiomatic: In the spring of the eleventh year, the former King of Han, Xin, once again rode in with Xiongnu cavalry and occupied Canhe, defying Han.

sentences.zh: 漢使柴將軍擊之，遺信書曰：「陛下寬仁，諸侯雖有畔亡，而復歸，輒復故位號，不誅也。

translations.literal: Han sent General Chai to attack him. He sent Xin a letter saying: 'His Majesty is generous and benevolent; when lords have rebelled and fled but returned, he has always restored their former titles and ranks, without executing them.'
translations.idiomatic: Han sent General Chai to attack him. Chai sent a letter to Xin, saying: 'His Majesty is generous and benevolent. When lords have rebelled and fled but later returned, he has always restored their former titles and ranks without executing them.

sentences.zh: 大王所知。

translations.literal: This the Great King knows.
translations.idiomatic: This Your Majesty knows well.

sentences.zh: 今王以敗亡走胡，非有大罪，急自歸！」

translations.literal: Now the King, having been defeated and fled to the Hu, has not committed a great crime; hurry and return of your own accord!'
translations.idiomatic: Now you fled to the Xiongnu after a defeat—this is not a grave crime. Return at once!'

sentences.zh: 韓王信報曰：「陛下擢仆起閭巷，南面稱孤，此仆之幸也。

translations.literal: Han King Xin replied: 'His Majesty raised me from the common lanes, to face south and be addressed as the Solitary One; this was my good fortune.'
translations.idiomatic: Han Xin the King of Han replied: 'His Majesty raised me from the common lanes to sit upon a throne facing south and bear the title of king. That was my great fortune.

sentences.zh: 滎陽之事，仆不能死，囚於項籍，此一罪也。

translations.literal: In the affair at Xingyang, I was unable to die but was captured by Xiang Ji; this is my first crime.
translations.idiomatic: At the siege of Xingyang, I could not manage to die but was taken prisoner by Xiang Ji. That is my first crime.

sentences.zh: 及寇攻馬邑，仆不能堅守，以城降之，此二罪也。

translations.literal: When the enemy attacked Mayi, I was unable to defend it firmly and surrendered the city to them; this is my second crime.
translations.idiomatic: When the enemy attacked Mayi, I could not hold the city and surrendered it to them. That is my second crime.

sentences.zh: 今反為寇將兵，與將軍爭一旦之命，此三罪也。

translations.literal: Now I have turned to lead enemy troops, contending with the General for survival on a single morning; this is my third crime.
translations.idiomatic: Now I have turned to lead enemy troops and contest with your generals for survival in a single morning's battle. That is my third crime.

sentences.zh: 夫種、蠡無一罪，身死亡；

translations.literal: Wen Zhong and Fan Li had not a single crime, yet they died or fled.
translations.idiomatic: Wen Zhong and Fan Li bore not a single crime, yet one was put to death and the other forced to flee.

sentences.zh: 今仆有三罪於陛下，而欲求活於世，此伍子胥所以僨於吳也。

translations.literal: Now I bear three crimes against His Majesty, yet wish to seek to live in the world; this is the reason Wu Zixu met his ruin in Wu.
translations.idiomatic: Now I bear three crimes against His Majesty and yet wish to go on living. This is precisely what brought Wu Zixu to his destruction in Wu.

sentences.zh: 今仆亡匿山谷閒，旦暮乞貸蠻夷，仆之思歸，如痿人不忘起，盲者不忘視也，勢不可耳。」

translations.literal: Now I hide in the mountain valleys, begging from the barbarians morning and evening. My longing to return is like the lame who never forget walking, or the blind who never forget sight—but circumstances will not allow it.'
translations.idiomatic: Now I hide among the mountain valleys, begging sustenance from the barbarians morning and evening. My longing to return home is like the cripple who never stops dreaming of walking, or the blind man who never stops dreaming of sight—but my circumstances will not permit it.'

sentences.zh: 遂戰。

translations.literal: They then fought.
translations.idiomatic: And so they fought.

sentences.zh: 柴將軍屠參合，斬韓王信。

translations.literal: General Chai sacked Canhe and beheaded Han King Xin.
translations.idiomatic: General Chai stormed Canhe and beheaded Han Xin, the King of Han.

translations.literal: Han ten years, Xin make Wang Huang wait say mislead Chen Xi. Eleven years spring, former Han Wang Xin again with Hu ride enter dwell Can He, resist Han. Han make Chai jiang jun strike it, send Xin book said: 'Bi Xia kuan ren, various hou though have pan perish, yet again return, then again old position number, not execute.' Da Wang place know. Now wang with defeat perish walk Hu, not have big crime, urgent self return!' Han Wang Xin report said: 'Bi Xia pick pu rise li xiang, south face call gu, this pu lucky.' Xing Yang affairs, pu cannot die, prisoner at Xiang Ji, this one crime. Reach bandit attack Ma Yi, pu cannot firm guard, with city descend it, this two crime. Now rebel become bandit jiang troops, with jiang jun contend one morning life, this three crime. Fu Zhong, Li no one crime, body death perish; Now pu have three crime at bi xia, yet desire seek live at world, this Wu Zi Xu so dun at Wu. Now pu perish hide mountain valley jian, dawn dusk beg lend Man Yi, pu think return, like cripple not forget rise, blind not forget see, power not able ear.' Then battle. Chai jiang jun slaughter Can He, cut Han Wang Xin.

sentences.zh: 信之入匈奴，與太子俱；

translations.literal: When Xin entered the Xiongnu lands, he brought the Crown Prince with him;
translations.idiomatic: When Xin went over to the Xiongnu, he brought his crown prince with him.

sentences.zh: 及至穨當城，生子，因名曰穨當。

translations.literal: When they reached the city of Tuidang, a son was born, and so he was named Tuidang.
translations.idiomatic: When they reached the city of Tuidang, a son was born, and the boy was named Tuidang after the place.

sentences.zh: 韓太子亦生子，命曰嬰。

translations.literal: The Han Crown Prince also had a son, whom he named Ying.
translations.idiomatic: The Han crown prince also had a son, whom he named Ying.

sentences.zh: 至孝文十四年，穨當及嬰率其眾降漢。

translations.literal: In the fourteenth year of Emperor Xiaowen, Tuidang and Ying led their followers to surrender to Han.
translations.idiomatic: In the fourteenth year of Emperor Wen's reign, Tuidang and Ying led their followers in submitting to Han.

sentences.zh: 漢封穨當為弓高侯，嬰為襄城侯。

translations.literal: Han enfeoffed Tuidang as Marquis of Gonggao and Ying as Marquis of Xiangcheng.
translations.idiomatic: Han enfeoffed Tuidang as the Marquis of Gonggao and Ying as the Marquis of Xiangcheng.

sentences.zh: 吳楚軍時，弓高侯功冠諸將。

translations.literal: During the war against Wu and Chu, the Marquis of Gonggao's merits were foremost among all the generals.
translations.idiomatic: During the Rebellion of Wu and Chu, the Marquis of Gonggao's achievements surpassed those of all the other generals.

sentences.zh: 傳子至孫，孫無子，失侯。

translations.literal: The title passed to his son and then to his grandson; the grandson had no son, and the marquisate was lost.
translations.idiomatic: The title passed to his son and then to his grandson, but the grandson had no heir, and the marquisate was lost.

sentences.zh: 嬰孫以不敬失侯。

translations.literal: Ying's grandson lost the marquisate for disrespect.
translations.idiomatic: Ying's grandson lost his marquisate on grounds of disrespect.

sentences.zh: 穨當孽孫韓嫣，貴幸，名富顯於當世。

translations.literal: Tuidang's descendant through a concubine's line, Han Yan, was honored and favored, and his name, wealth, and prominence were known in his time.
translations.idiomatic: Tuidang's descendant through a concubine's line, Han Yan, became a court favorite, and his name and wealth were renowned in his generation.

sentences.zh: 其弟說，再封，數稱將軍，卒為案道侯。

translations.literal: His younger brother Yue was twice enfeoffed, served as general several times, and ultimately became the Marquis of Andao.
translations.idiomatic: His younger brother Yue was enfeoffed a second time, served several times as general, and ultimately became the Marquis of Andao.

sentences.zh: 子代，歲餘坐法死。

translations.literal: His son succeeded him; after more than a year, he was convicted of a crime and executed.
translations.idiomatic: His son succeeded him, but within a year was convicted of a crime and put to death.

sentences.zh: 後歲餘，說孫曾拜為龍頟侯，續說後。

translations.literal: More than a year later, Yue's grandson Zeng was appointed Marquis of Longe, continuing Yue's line.
translations.idiomatic: More than a year later, Yue's grandson Zeng was enfeoffed as the Marquis of Longe to continue Yue's line.

translations.literal: Xin enter Xiong Nu, with crown prince both; Reach reach Peng Dang city, give birth son, because name said Peng Dang. Han crown prince also give birth son, life said Ying. Reach Xiao Wen fourteen years, Peng Dang and Ying lead their crowd descend Han. Han seal Peng Dang become Gong Gao hou, Ying become Xiang Cheng hou. Wu Chu army time, Gong Gao hou merit crown various jiang. Transmit son reach grandson, grandson no son, lose hou. Ying grandson with not respect lose hou. Peng Dang bastard grandson Han Yan, noble fortunate, name rich manifest at dang world. His brother Shuo, again seal, number call jiang jun, die become An Dao hou. Son replace, year remain sit law die. After year remain, Shuo grandson Zeng appoint become Long Shou hou, continue Shuo after.

sentences.zh: 盧綰者，豐人也，與高祖同里。

translations.literal: Lu Wan was a man of Feng, from the same village as the High Ancestor.
translations.idiomatic: Lu Wan was a man of Feng, from the same village as the High Ancestor.

sentences.zh: 盧綰親與高祖太上皇相愛，及生男，高祖、盧綰同日生，里中持羊酒賀兩家。

translations.literal: Lu Wan's parents and the High Ancestor's father, the Grand Supreme Emperor, were close friends. When their sons were born, the High Ancestor and Lu Wan were born on the same day, and the villagers brought lamb and wine to congratulate both families.
translations.idiomatic: Lu Wan's parents were close friends with the High Ancestor's father, the Grand Supreme Emperor. When both families had sons, the High Ancestor and Lu Wan were born on the same day, and the villagers brought lamb and wine to congratulate both households.

sentences.zh: 及高祖、盧綰壯，俱學書，又相愛也。

translations.literal: When the High Ancestor and Lu Wan grew up, they studied together, and they were fond of each other.
translations.idiomatic: When the High Ancestor and Lu Wan came of age, they studied together and grew fond of each other.

sentences.zh: 里中嘉兩家親相愛，生子同日，壯又相愛，復賀兩家羊酒。

translations.literal: The villagers, delighted that the two families were close and their sons born on the same day grew up fond of each other, again congratulated both families with lamb and wine.
translations.idiomatic: The villagers marveled that the two families had been close friends, that their sons were born on the same day, and that the boys grew up devoted to each other. Once again they brought lamb and wine to congratulate both households.

sentences.zh: 高祖為布衣時，有吏事辟匿，盧綰常隨出入上下。

translations.literal: When the High Ancestor was a commoner and had to flee and hide because of legal troubles, Lu Wan always accompanied him wherever he went.
translations.idiomatic: When the High Ancestor was still a commoner and had to go into hiding over legal troubles, Lu Wan always accompanied him wherever he went.

sentences.zh: 及高祖初起沛，盧綰以客從，入漢中為將軍，常侍中。

translations.literal: When the High Ancestor first rose in revolt at Pei, Lu Wan followed as a retainer, entered Hanzhong and was made a general, and constantly attended at court.
translations.idiomatic: When the High Ancestor first rose in revolt at Pei, Lu Wan followed as a retainer. He entered Hanzhong, was made a general, and attended constantly at court.

sentences.zh: 從東擊項籍，以太尉常從，出入臥內，衣被飲食賞賜，群臣莫敢望，雖蕭曹等，特以事見禮，至其親幸，莫及盧綰。

translations.literal: He followed the eastward campaign against Xiang Ji, and as Grand Commandant he constantly attended, going in and out of the bedchamber. In clothing, bedding, food, drink, and gifts, no minister dared aspire to his level. Even Xiao He and Cao Can were only treated with ceremony on account of their duties; as for intimate favor, none could match Lu Wan.
translations.idiomatic: He followed the eastward campaign against Xiang Ji, serving as Grand Commandant and constantly at the Emperor's side, even entering the private chambers. In clothing, bedding, food, drink, and gifts bestowed, no minister dared aspire to his level. Even Xiao He and Cao Can were only accorded respect on account of their official duties—when it came to intimate favor, none could match Lu Wan.

sentences.zh: 綰封為長安侯。

translations.literal: Wan was enfeoffed as the Marquis of Chang'an.
translations.idiomatic: Wan was enfeoffed as the Marquis of Chang'an.

sentences.zh: 長安，故咸陽也。

translations.literal: Chang'an was the former Xianyang.
translations.idiomatic: Chang'an was the site of the former Xianyang.

translations.literal: Lu Wan, Feng person, with Gao Zu same li. Lu Wan close with Gao Zu tai shang huang each love, reach give birth male, Gao Zu, Lu Wan same day give birth, li middle hold sheep wine congratulate two home. Reach Gao Zu, Lu Wan strong, both study book, again each love. Li middle praise two home close each love, give birth son same day, strong again each love, again congratulate two home sheep wine. Gao Zu become bu yi time, have li affairs bi ni, Lu Wan constant follow go out enter up down. Reach Gao Zu begin rise Pei, Lu Wan with guest follow, enter Han Zhong become jiang jun, constant serve middle. Follow east strike Xiang Ji, with tai wei constant follow, go out enter sleep inner, clothes cover eat drink reward grant, group minister not dare hope, though Xiao Cao wait, special with affairs see li, reach his close fortunate, not reach Lu Wan. Wan seal become Chang An hou. Chang An, old Xian Yang.

sentences.zh: 漢五年冬，以破項籍，乃使盧綰別將，與劉賈擊臨江王共尉，破之。

translations.literal: In the winter of the fifth year of Han, after defeating Xiang Ji, he sent Lu Wan to command a separate force, joining Liu Jia to attack Gong Wei, the King of Linjiang, and defeated him.
translations.idiomatic: In the winter of the fifth year of the Han dynasty, after the defeat of Xiang Ji, the Emperor dispatched Lu Wan to command a separate force. Together with Liu Jia, he attacked and defeated Gong Wei, the King of Linjiang.

sentences.zh: 七月還，從擊燕王臧荼，臧荼降。

translations.literal: In the seventh month he returned, and joined in attacking Zang Tu, the King of Yan; Zang Tu surrendered.
translations.idiomatic: In the seventh month he returned and joined the campaign against Zang Tu, the King of Yan. Zang Tu surrendered.

sentences.zh: 高祖已定天下，諸侯非劉氏而王者七人。

translations.literal: After the High Ancestor had settled the realm, there were seven lords who were kings but not of the Liu surname.
translations.idiomatic: After the High Ancestor had settled the realm, there were seven men who held the title of king yet were not of the Liu surname.

sentences.zh: 欲王盧綰，為群臣觖望。

translations.literal: He wished to make Lu Wan a king, but this caused resentment among his ministers.
translations.idiomatic: He wished to make Lu Wan a king, but this aroused resentment among his ministers.

sentences.zh: 及虜臧荼，乃下詔諸將相列侯，擇群臣有功者以為燕王。

translations.literal: After capturing Zang Tu, he issued a decree to the generals, ministers, and marquises, to select a meritorious minister to be King of Yan.
translations.idiomatic: After Zang Tu's capture, the Emperor issued a decree to his generals, ministers, and marquises, directing them to select a meritorious minister to serve as King of Yan.

sentences.zh: 群臣知上欲王盧綰，皆言曰：「太尉長安侯盧綰常從平定天下，功最多，可王燕。」

translations.literal: The ministers, knowing the Emperor wished to make Lu Wan king, all said: 'The Grand Commandant, the Marquis of Chang'an, Lu Wan, has constantly followed in pacifying the realm and has the most merit; he may be made King of Yan.'
translations.idiomatic: The ministers, knowing the Emperor wished to make Lu Wan king, all declared: 'The Grand Commandant, the Marquis of Chang'an, Lu Wan, has followed the Emperor throughout the pacification of the realm and has the greatest merit. He should be made King of Yan.'

sentences.zh: 詔許之。

translations.literal: An edict approved it.
translations.idiomatic: The Emperor issued an edict granting the request.

sentences.zh: 漢五年八月，乃立虜綰為燕王。

translations.literal: In the eighth month of the fifth year of Han, Lu Wan was established as King of Yan.
translations.idiomatic: In the eighth month of the fifth year of the Han dynasty, Lu Wan was established as King of Yan.

sentences.zh: 諸侯王得幸莫如燕王。

translations.literal: Among the lords who were kings, none was as favored as the King of Yan.
translations.idiomatic: Of all the vassal kings, none enjoyed greater imperial favor than the King of Yan.

translations.literal: Han five years winter, with break Xiang Ji, then make Lu Wan separate lead, with Liu Jia strike Lin Jiang wang Gong Wei, break it. Seven month return, follow strike Yan wang Zang Tu, Zang Tu descend. Gao Zu already settle tian xia, various hou not Liu shi yet wang seven people. Desire wang Lu Wan, become group minister ju wang. Reach capture Zang Tu, then descend zhao various jiang xiang lie hou, select group minister have merit become Yan wang. Group minister know shang desire wang Lu Wan, all speak said: 'Tai wei Chang An hou Lu Wan constant follow settle tian xia, merit most many, able wang Yan.' Zhao allow it. Han five years eight month, then establish Lu Wan become Yan wang. Various hou wang obtain fortunate not like Yan wang.

sentences.zh: 漢十一年秋，陳豨反代地，高祖如邯鄲擊豨兵，燕王綰亦擊其東北。

translations.literal: In the autumn of the eleventh year of Han, Chen Xi rebelled in the territory of Dai. The High Ancestor went to Handan to attack Xi's forces, and the King of Yan, Wan, also attacked his northeast.
translations.idiomatic: In the autumn of the eleventh year, Chen Xi rebelled in the territory of Dai. The High Ancestor marched to Handan to attack Chen Xi's forces, and the King of Yan, Wan, also struck at his northeastern flank.

sentences.zh: 當是時，陳豨使王黃求救匈奴。

translations.literal: At that time, Chen Xi sent Wang Huang to seek aid from the Xiongnu.
translations.idiomatic: At that time, Chen Xi sent Wang Huang to seek aid from the Xiongnu.

sentences.zh: 燕王綰亦使其臣張勝於匈奴，言豨等軍破。

translations.literal: The King of Yan, Wan, also sent his minister Zhang Sheng to the Xiongnu to announce that Xi's army had been defeated.
translations.idiomatic: The King of Yan also sent his minister Zhang Sheng to the Xiongnu to report that Chen Xi's army had been defeated.

sentences.zh: 張勝至胡，故燕王臧茶子衍出亡在胡，見張勝曰：「公所以重於燕者，以習胡事也。

translations.literal: When Zhang Sheng reached the Hu lands, Yan, the son of the former King of Yan Zang Tu, who had fled and was living among the Hu, met Zhang Sheng and said: 'The reason you are valued by Yan is that you understand the affairs of the Hu.'
translations.idiomatic: When Zhang Sheng reached the Xiongnu lands, Yan, the son of the former King of Yan Zang Tu, who had fled and was living among the Xiongnu, met him and said: 'The reason you are valued in Yan is that you understand the affairs of the northern peoples.

sentences.zh: 燕所以久存者，以諸侯數反，兵連不決也。

translations.literal: The reason Yan has long survived is that the lords have frequently rebelled, keeping the armies engaged without resolution.
translations.idiomatic: The reason Yan has survived so long is that the various lords have frequently rebelled, keeping the armies tied down without a decisive resolution.

sentences.zh: 今公為燕欲急滅豨等，豨等已盡，次亦至燕，公等亦且為虜矣。

translations.literal: Now you act on Yan's behalf and wish to quickly destroy Xi and the rest; once Xi and the rest are finished, the next target will be Yan, and you and the others will become prisoners.
translations.idiomatic: Now you act on Yan's behalf, eager to destroy Chen Xi and his allies. But once they are finished, the court will turn its attention to Yan, and you and the others will become prisoners.

sentences.zh: 公何不令燕且緩陳豨而與胡和？

translations.literal: Why don't you have Yan slow its campaign against Chen Xi and make peace with the Hu?
translations.idiomatic: Why not have Yan ease up on the campaign against Chen Xi and make peace with the Xiongnu?

sentences.zh: 事寬，得長王燕；

translations.literal: If things ease, you can long remain king of Yan;
translations.idiomatic: If the situation relaxes, you can remain king of Yan for a long time.

sentences.zh: 即有漢急，可以安國。」

translations.literal: If there is urgency from Han, you can keep the state secure.'
translations.idiomatic: And should Han press you, you will have the means to keep the state secure.'

sentences.zh: 張勝以為然，豨私令匈奴助豨等擊燕。

translations.literal: Zhang Sheng thought this was right, and secretly had the Xiongnu help Xi and the others attack Yan.
translations.idiomatic: Zhang Sheng found this reasoning persuasive and secretly arranged for the Xiongnu to assist Chen Xi's forces in raiding Yan.

sentences.zh: 燕王綰疑張勝與胡反，上書請族張勝。

translations.literal: The King of Yan, Wan, suspected Zhang Sheng of conspiring with the Hu to rebel, and submitted a memorial requesting the execution of Zhang Sheng's entire clan.
translations.idiomatic: The King of Yan suspected Zhang Sheng of conspiring with the Xiongnu to rebel and submitted a memorial requesting that Zhang Sheng's entire clan be executed.

sentences.zh: 勝還，具道所以為者。

translations.literal: Sheng returned and fully explained the reasons for his actions.
translations.idiomatic: When Zhang Sheng returned, he explained the full reasoning behind his actions.

sentences.zh: 燕王寤，乃詐論它人，脫勝家屬，使得為匈奴閒，而陰使范齊之陳豨所，欲令久亡，連兵勿決。

translations.literal: The King of Yan understood, and so fraudulently convicted another person, freed Sheng's family, and had Sheng serve as an agent between the Xiongnu, while secretly sending Fan Qi to Chen Xi's camp, wishing to prolong the conflict and keep the armies engaged without resolution.
translations.idiomatic: The King of Yan came to understand and so framed another man in Zhang Sheng's place, freed Sheng's family, and had Sheng serve as a liaison with the Xiongnu. Meanwhile, he secretly sent Fan Qi to Chen Xi's camp, intending to prolong the conflict and keep the armies locked in an unresolved stalemate.

translations.literal: Han eleven years autumn, Chen Xi rebel Dai land, Gao Zu like Han Dan strike Xi troops, Yan wang Wan also strike its north east. When this time, Chen Xi make Wang Huang seek save Xiong Nu. Yan wang Wan also make his minister Zhang Sheng at Xiong Nu, speak Xi wait army break. Zhang Sheng reach Hu, old Yan wang Zang Cha son Yan out perish at Hu, see Zhang Sheng said: 'Gong so heavy at Yan, with practice Hu affairs.' Yan so long exist, with various hou number rebel, troops connect not decide. Now gong become Yan desire urgent extinguish Xi wait, Xi wait already exhaust, next also reach Yan, gong wait also and become captive. Gong what not make Yan and slow Chen Xi yet with Hu and? Affairs wide, obtain long wang Yan; That have Han urgent, able settle country.' Zhang Sheng with think so, Xi private make Xiong Nu help Xi wait strike Yan. Yan wang Wan suspect Zhang Sheng with Hu rebel, shang book please clan Zhang Sheng. Sheng return, all way so become. Yan wang Wu, then cheat judge other person, take off Sheng home belong, make obtain become Xiong Nu jian, yet yin make Fan Qi reach Chen Xi place, desire make long perish, connect troops not decide.

sentences.zh: 漢十二年，東擊黥布，豨常將兵居代，漢使樊噲擊斬豨。

translations.literal: In the twelfth year of Han, during the eastern campaign against Qing Bu, Xi continued to command troops in Dai. Han sent Fan Kuai to attack and behead Xi.
translations.idiomatic: In the twelfth year, while the Emperor campaigned east against Qing Bu, Chen Xi continued to hold Dai with his forces. Han sent Fan Kuai to attack and behead Chen Xi.

sentences.zh: 其裨將降，言燕王綰使范齊通計謀於豨所。

translations.literal: One of Xi's subordinate generals surrendered and reported that the King of Yan, Wan, had sent Fan Qi to communicate plots with Xi.
translations.idiomatic: One of Chen Xi's subordinate generals surrendered and revealed that the King of Yan had sent Fan Qi to coordinate plots with Chen Xi.

sentences.zh: 高祖使使召盧綰，綰稱病。

translations.literal: The High Ancestor sent an envoy to summon Lu Wan; Wan pleaded illness.
translations.idiomatic: The High Ancestor sent a messenger to summon Lu Wan, but Wan pleaded illness.

sentences.zh: 上又使辟陽侯審食其、御史大夫趙堯往迎燕王，因驗問左右。

translations.literal: The Emperor also sent the Marquis of Biyang, Shen Shiqi, and the Grand Censor Zhao Yao to go and receive the King of Yan, and to investigate and question those around him.
translations.idiomatic: The Emperor then sent the Marquis of Biyang, Shen Shiqi, and the Grand Censor Zhao Yao to receive the King of Yan and to investigate and interrogate his attendants.

sentences.zh: 綰愈恐，閉匿，謂其幸臣曰：「非劉氏而王，獨我與長沙耳。

translations.literal: Wan grew more afraid and shut himself away in hiding. He said to his favored ministers: 'Among those who are kings but not of the Liu surname, only I and the King of Changsha remain.'
translations.idiomatic: Wan grew even more fearful and shut himself away. He confided to his trusted ministers: 'Of those who bear the title of king without being of the Liu surname, only I and the King of Changsha remain.

sentences.zh: 往年春，漢族淮陰，夏，誅彭越，皆呂后計。

translations.literal: Last year in spring, Han exterminated the clan of the Marquis of Huaiyin; in summer, Peng Yue was executed—all were Empress Lu's schemes.
translations.idiomatic: Last spring, the court destroyed the clan of the Marquis of Huaiyin. That summer, Peng Yue was executed. Both were the schemes of Empress Lu.

sentences.zh: 今上病，屬任呂后。

translations.literal: Now the Emperor is ill and has entrusted affairs to Empress Lu.
translations.idiomatic: Now the Emperor is ill and has entrusted affairs of state to Empress Lu.

sentences.zh: 呂后婦人，專欲以事誅異姓王者及大功臣。」

translations.literal: Empress Lu is a woman who desires only to find pretexts to execute kings of different surnames and great meritorious ministers.'
translations.idiomatic: Empress Lu is a woman bent on finding pretexts to execute kings of other surnames and great meritorious ministers.'

sentences.zh: 乃遂稱病不行。

translations.literal: He thereupon continued to plead illness and did not go.
translations.idiomatic: And so he continued to plead illness and refused to go.

sentences.zh: 其左右皆亡匿。

translations.literal: All those around him fled and went into hiding.
translations.idiomatic: His attendants all fled and went into hiding.

sentences.zh: 語頗泄，辟陽侯聞之，歸具報上，上益怒。

translations.literal: Word of this leaked; the Marquis of Biyang heard of it, returned and reported everything to the Emperor, and the Emperor grew more angry.
translations.idiomatic: Word of this leaked out. The Marquis of Biyang heard the report, returned to court, and relayed everything to the Emperor. The Emperor's anger only deepened.

sentences.zh: 又得匈奴降者，降者言張勝亡在匈奴，為燕使。

translations.literal: Moreover, a Xiongnu defector was captured, and the defector said Zhang Sheng had fled and was among the Xiongnu, serving as an envoy of Yan.
translations.idiomatic: Furthermore, a Xiongnu defector was captured, and the defector reported that Zhang Sheng had fled to the Xiongnu, where he was serving as an envoy of Yan.

sentences.zh: 於是上曰：「盧綰果反矣！」

translations.literal: Thereupon the Emperor said: 'Lu Wan has indeed rebelled!'
translations.idiomatic: At this, the Emperor declared: 'Lu Wan has indeed rebelled!'

sentences.zh: 使樊噲擊燕。

translations.literal: He sent Fan Kuai to attack Yan.
translations.idiomatic: He sent Fan Kuai to attack Yan.

sentences.zh: 燕王綰悉將其宮人家屬騎數千居長城下，侯伺，幸上病愈，自入謝。

translations.literal: The King of Yan, Wan, took all his palace women and family members with several thousand cavalry to camp below the Great Wall, waiting and watching, hoping the Emperor would recover from his illness so he could personally go and offer his apologies.
translations.idiomatic: The King of Yan gathered all his palace women and family members, along with several thousand cavalry, and camped below the Great Wall, watching and waiting, hoping that the Emperor would recover so he could go in person to beg forgiveness.

sentences.zh: 四月，高祖崩，盧綰遂將其眾亡入匈奴，匈奴以為東胡盧王。

translations.literal: In the fourth month, the High Ancestor died. Lu Wan thereupon led his followers to flee into the Xiongnu lands. The Xiongnu made him King Lu of the Eastern Hu.
translations.idiomatic: In the fourth month, the High Ancestor died. Lu Wan then led his followers across the border into Xiongnu territory. The Xiongnu made him King Lu of the Eastern Hu.

sentences.zh: 綰為蠻夷所侵奪，常思復歸。

translations.literal: Wan was encroached upon and plundered by the barbarians, and he constantly thought of returning.
translations.idiomatic: Among the barbarians, Wan was constantly harassed and plundered, and he never stopped longing to return home.

sentences.zh: 居歲餘，死胡中。

translations.literal: After more than a year, he died among the Hu.
translations.idiomatic: After little more than a year, he died among the Xiongnu.

translations.literal: Han twelve years, east strike Qing Bu, Xi constant lead troops dwell Dai, Han make Fan Kuai strike cut Xi. Its pi jiang descend, speak Yan wang Wan make Fan Qi pass plan plot at Xi place. Gao Zu make shi summon Lu Wan, Wan claim illness. Shang again make Pi Yang hou Shen Shi Qi, yu shi da fu Zhao Yao go welcome Yan wang, because examine ask left right. Wan more fear, close hide, speak his fortunate minister said: 'Not Liu shi yet wang, alone I and Chang Sha ear. Go year spring, Han clan Huai Yin, summer, kill Peng Yue, all Lü Hou plan. Now shang illness, belong duty Lü Hou. Lü Hou woman person, specialize desire with affairs kill different surname wang and big merit minister.' Then then claim illness not go. Its left right all perish hide. Speak somewhat leak, Pi Yang hou hear it, return all report shang, shang benefit anger. Again obtain Xiong Nu descend, descend speak Zhang Sheng perish at Xiong Nu, become Yan shi. Then shang said: 'Lu Wan fruit rebel!' Make Fan Kuai strike Yan. Yan wang Wan all lead his palace person home belong ride several thousand dwell long city down, hou si, fortunate shang illness better, self enter thank. Four month, Gao Zu collapse, Lu Wan then lead his crowd perish enter Xiong Nu, Xiong Nu with become Dong Hu Lu wang. Wan become Man Yi place invade rob, constant think again return. Dwell year remain, die Hu middle.

sentences.zh: 高后時，盧綰妻子亡降漢，會高后病，不能見，舍燕邸，為欲置酒見之。

translations.literal: During the time of Empress Gao, Lu Wan's wife and children fled and surrendered to Han. It happened that Empress Gao was ill and could not receive them, so she lodged them at the Yan residence, intending to arrange a banquet to meet them.
translations.idiomatic: During Empress Gao's regency, Lu Wan's wife and children fled and surrendered to Han. But as it happened, Empress Gao was ill and could not receive them. She lodged them at the Yan residence, intending to hold a banquet to meet them.

sentences.zh: 高祖竟崩，不得見。

translations.literal: Empress Gao finally died, and the meeting never took place.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Gao died before the meeting could take place.

sentences.zh: 盧綰妻亦病死。

translations.literal: Lu Wan's wife also fell ill and died.
translations.idiomatic: Lu Wan's wife also fell ill and died.

translations.literal: Gao Hou time, Lu Wan wife son perish descend Han, meet Gao Hou illness, cannot see, shed Yan di, become desire place wine see it. Gao Zu finally collapse, not obtain see. Lu Wan wife also illness die.

sentences.zh: 孝景中六年，盧綰孫他之，以東胡王降，封為亞谷侯。

translations.literal: In the sixth year of the middle reign of Emperor Xiaojing, Lu Wan's grandson Tazhi surrendered as King of the Eastern Hu and was enfeoffed as Marquis of Yagu.
translations.idiomatic: In the sixth year of the middle reign of Emperor Jing, Lu Wan's grandson Tazhi surrendered in his capacity as King of the Eastern Hu and was enfeoffed as the Marquis of Yagu.

translations.literal: Xiao Jing middle six years, Lu Wan grandson Ta Zhi, with Dong Hu wang descend, seal become Ya Gu hou.

sentences.zh: 陳豨者，宛朐人也，不知始所以得從。

translations.literal: Chen Xi was a man of Wanqu. It is not known how he first came to serve.
translations.idiomatic: Chen Xi was a man of Wanqu. It is not known how he first came to enter service.

sentences.zh: 及高祖七年冬，韓王信反，入匈奴，上至平城還，乃封豨為列侯，以趙相國將監趙、代邊兵，邊兵皆屬焉。

translations.literal: In the winter of the High Ancestor's seventh year, when Han King Xin rebelled and went over to the Xiongnu and the Emperor went to Pingcheng and returned, Chen Xi was enfeoffed as a marquis, appointed as Chancellor of Zhao to command and supervise the border troops of Zhao and Dai; all the border troops were placed under his authority.
translations.idiomatic: In the winter of the High Ancestor's seventh year, after Han Xin the King of Han rebelled and fled to the Xiongnu and the Emperor had gone to Pingcheng and returned, Chen Xi was enfeoffed as a marquis and appointed Chancellor of Zhao with command over the border troops of Zhao and Dai. All the border forces were placed under his authority.

translations.literal: Chen Xi, Wan Qu person, not know start so obtain follow. Reach Gao Zu seven years winter, Han wang Xin rebel, enter Xiong Nu, shang reach Ping Cheng return, then seal Xi become lie hou, with Zhao xiang guo lead supervise Zhao, Dai border troops, border troops all belong it.

sentences.zh: 豨常告歸過趙，趙相周昌見豨賓客隨之者千餘乘，邯鄲官舍皆滿。

translations.literal: Xi often took leave and passed through Zhao. The Chancellor of Zhao, Zhou Chang, observed that more than a thousand carriages of retainers followed Xi, and the official guesthouses in Handan were all full.
translations.idiomatic: Chen Xi frequently took leave and passed through Zhao. The Chancellor of Zhao, Zhou Chang, observed that more than a thousand carriages of retainers accompanied him, and the official guesthouses of Handan were all full to overflowing.

sentences.zh: 豨所以待賓客布衣交，皆出客下。

translations.literal: Xi treated his retainers with the deference of a commoner's friendship, always placing himself beneath his guests.
translations.idiomatic: Chen Xi treated his retainers with the humility of a man among equals, always placing himself below his guests in courtesy.

sentences.zh: 豨還之代，周昌乃求入見。

translations.literal: When Xi returned to Dai, Zhou Chang sought an audience with the Emperor.
translations.idiomatic: When Chen Xi returned to Dai, Zhou Chang sought an audience with the Emperor.

sentences.zh: 見上，具言豨賓客盛甚，擅兵於外數歲，恐有變。
上乃令人覆案豨客居代者財物諸不法事，多連引豨。
豨恐，陰令客通使王黃、曼丘臣所。
及高祖十年七月，太上皇崩，使人召豨，豨稱病甚。
九月，遂與王黃等反，自立為代王，劫略趙、代。

translations.literal: Xi constant tell return pass Zhao, Zhao xiang Zhou Chang see Xi bin guest follow it several thousand ride, Han Dan official shed all full. Xi so wait bin guest bu yi jiao, all out guest down. Xi return Dai, Zhou Chang then seek enter see. See shang, all speak Xi bin guest abundant very, arbitrarily troops at outer several years, fear have change. Shang then make person cover examine Xi guest dwell Dai wealth thing various not law affairs, many connect lead Xi. Xi fear, yin make guest pass shi Wang Huang, Man Qiu Chen place. Reach Gao Zu ten years seven month, tai shang huang collapse, make person summon Xi, Xi claim illness very. Nine month, then with Wang Huang wait rebel, self establish become Dai wang, rob sweep Zhao, Dai.

sentences.zh: 上聞，乃赦趙、代吏人為豨所詿誤劫略者，皆赦之。
上自往，至邯鄲，喜曰：「豨不南據漳水，北守邯鄲，知其無能為也。」
趙相奏斬常山守、尉，曰：「常山二十五城，豨反，亡其二十城。」
上問曰：「守、尉反乎？」
對曰：「不反。」
上曰：「是力不足也。」
赦之，復以為常山守、尉。
上問周昌曰：「趙亦有壯士可令將者乎？」
對曰：「有四人。」
四人謁，上謾罵曰：「豎子能為將乎？」
四人慚伏。
上封之各千戶，以為將。
左右諫曰：「從入蜀、漢，伐楚，功未遍行，今此何功而封？」
上曰：「非若所知！
陳豨反，邯鄲以北皆豨有，吾以羽檄徵天下兵，未有至者，今唯獨邯鄲中兵耳。
吾胡愛四千戶封四人，不以慰趙子弟！」
皆曰：「善。」
於是上曰：「陳豨將誰？」
曰：「王黃、曼丘臣，皆故賈人。」
上曰：「吾知之矣。」
乃各以千金購黃、臣等。

translations.literal: Shang hear, then pardon Zhao, Dai li person become Xi place cheat mistake rob sweep, all pardon it. Shang self go, reach Han Dan, happy said: 'Xi not south according Zhang Shui, north guard Han Dan, know its no able become.' Zhao xiang memorial cut Chang Shan guard, wei, said: 'Chang Shan twenty five city, Xi rebel, perish its twenty city.' Shang ask said: 'Guard, wei rebel?' Answer said: 'Not rebel.' Shang said: 'This strength not enough.' Pardon it, again become Chang Shan guard, wei. Shang ask Zhou Chang said: 'Zhao also have strong shi able make lead?' Answer said: 'Have four people.' Four people ye, shang man scold said: 'Shu zi able become jiang?' Four people shame prostrate. Shang seal it each thousand hu, become jiang. Left right advise said: 'Follow enter Shu, Han, attack Chu, merit not all line, now this what merit yet seal?' Shang said: 'Not if place know! Chen Xi rebel, Han Dan with north all Xi have, I with yu xi raise tian xia troops, not have reach, now only alone Han Dan middle troops ear. I Hu love four thousand hu seal four people, not with comfort Zhao zi brother!' All said: 'Good.' Then shang said: 'Chen Xi lead who?' Said: 'Wang Huang, Man Qiu Chen, all old Jia person.' Shang said: 'I know it.' Then each with thousand jin purchase Huang, Chen wait.

sentences.zh: 十一年冬，漢兵擊斬陳豨將侯敞、王黃於曲逆下，破豨將張春於聊城，斬首萬餘。
太尉勃入定太原、代地。
十二月，上自擊東垣，東垣不下，卒罵上；
東垣降，卒罵者斬之，不罵者黥之。
更命東垣為真定。
王黃、曼丘臣其麾下受購賞之，皆生得，以故陳豨軍遂敗。

translations.literal: Eleven years winter, Han troops strike cut Chen Xi jiang Hou Chang, Wang Huang at Qu Ni down, break Xi jiang Zhang Chun at Liao Cheng, cut head ten thousand remain. Tai wei Bo enter settle Tai Yuan, Dai land. Twelve month, shang self strike Dong Yuan, Dong Yuan not descend, zu scold shang; Dong Yuan descend, zu scold cut it, not scold qing it. Change life Dong Yuan become Zhen Ding. Wang Huang, Man Qiu Chen its wei down receive purchase reward, all live obtain, with reason Chen Xi army then defeat.

sentences.zh: 上還至洛陽。
上曰：「代居常山北，趙乃從山南有之，遠。」
乃立子恒為代王，都中都，代、鴈門皆屬代。

translations.literal: Shang return reach Luo Yang. Shang said: 'Dai dwell Chang Shan north, Zhao then from mountain south have it, far.' Then establish son Heng become Dai wang, capital Zhong Du, Dai, Yan Men all belong Dai.

sentences.zh: 高祖十二年冬，樊噲軍卒追斬豨於靈丘。

translations.literal: Gao Zu twelve years winter, Fan Kuai army zu pursue cut Xi at Ling Qiu.

sentences.zh: 太史公曰：韓信、盧綰非素積德累善之世，徼一時權變，以詐力成功，遭漢初定，故得列地，南面稱孤。
內見疑彊大，外倚蠻貊以為援，是以日疏自危，事窮智困，卒赴匈奴，豈不哀哉！
陳豨，梁人，其少時數稱慕魏公子；
及將軍守邊，招致賓客而下士，名聲過實。
周昌疑之，疵瑕頗起，懼禍及身，邪人進說，遂陷無道。
於戲悲夫！
夫計之生孰成敗於人也深矣！

translations.literal: Tai shi gong said: Han Xin, Lu Wan not su accumulate virtue accumulate good world, jiao one time power change, with zha li success, encounter Han begin settle, therefore obtain arrange land, south face call gu. Inner see suspect qiang big, outer rely Man Mo become aid, therefore day su self danger, affairs poor wisdom kun, finally go Xiong Nu, qi not sorrow! Chen Xi, Liang person, its young time number call admire Wei gong zi; Reach jiang jun guard border, recruit reach bin guest yet down shi, name sound over real. Zhou Chang suspect it, ci xia somewhat rise, fear calamity reach body, evil person advance say, then trap no way. Yu xi sorrow! Fu plan become shu success fail at person deep!
